hooks.command: sh -c 'branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); case "$branch" in cowork/*) slug=${branch#cowork/}; echo "=== cowork session: $branch ==="; if [ -f ".cowork/$slug.md" ]; then cat ".cowork/$slug.md"; else echo "(no handoff file at .cowork/$slug.md — run /cowork:handoff)"; fi; echo; echo "--- last 5 commits ---"; git log --oneline -5; ;; esac'
